scenario.name: IMS Call UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE tel:[field10] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];lr> From: <sip:+86[field9]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <tel:[field10]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel";audio;video;+g.3gpp.mid-call;+g.3gpp.srvcc-orig-pre-alerting P-Preferred-Identity: <sip:+86[field9]@[field1]> P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=460110[field0] Privacy: none P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=msrp-originating-[field9]@[field1] [$security_header] Supported: precondition, 100rel, timer, sec-agree Accept: application/sdp, application/3gpp-ims+xml Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, UPDATE, REFER, NOTIFY, MESSAGE, OPTIONS User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:96 0-15 a=curr:qos local none a=curr:qos remote none a=des:qos mandatory local sendrecv a=des:qos optional remote sendrecv a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

PRACK sip:+8618107000002@mmtel.ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org:5065 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 PRACK RAck: 101 1 INVITE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel";audio;video;+g.3gpp.mid-call;+g.3gpp.srvcc-orig-pre-alerting P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=46001123456789 [$security_header] User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Content-Length: 0

UPDATE sip:+8618107000002@mmtel.ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org:5065 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 UPDATE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel";audio;video;+g.3gpp.mid-call;+g.3gpp.srvcc-orig-pre-alerting P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=46001123456789 [$security_header] Supported: precondition, timer, sec-agree, 100rel User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 96 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:96 0-15 a=curr:qos local sendrecv a=curr:qos remote none a=des:qos mandatory local sendrecv a=des:qos mandatory remote sendrecv a=sendrecv a=ptime:20

ACK sip:+8618107000002@mmtel.ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org:5065 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel";audio;video;+g.3gpp.mid-call;+g.3gpp.srvcc-orig-pre-alerting [$security_header] P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=46001123456789 User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:+8618107000002@mmtel.ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org:5065 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 4 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:+86[field9]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+sip.instance="<urn:gsma:imei:86253004-794212-0>";+g.3gpp.icsi-ref="urn%3Aurn-7%3A3gpp-service.ims.icsi.mmtel";audio;video;+g.3gpp.mid-call;+g.3gpp.srvcc-orig-pre-alerting [$security_header] P-Access-Network-Info: 3GPP-E-UTRAN-FDD;utran-cell-id-3gpp=46001123456789 P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=IMS-SIPp-[call_id];orig-ioi=[field1];term-ioi=[field1] User-Agent: IM-client/OMA1.0 HW-Rto/V1.0 Content-Length: 0
